error.no_code: Couldn't find a `code` parameter in the value you pasted. Paste the full `com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=...` URL, or just the value of the `code` parameter on its own.

data_description.region: Shark IQ uses different services in the EU. Select your region to connect to the correct service for your account.

user.description: Sign in to your SharkClean account. If Shark's Auth0 captcha trips, you'll be asked to complete a one-time browser login.

data_description.redirect_url: Paste the full `com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=...&state=...` callback URL from your browser, or just the `code` value on its own.

pkce.description:
Shark's Auth0 service wants a one-time browser sign-in (captcha). Follow these steps **exactly**:

**1.** Open this URL in a **private / incognito** browser window (so it can't reuse a stale Auth0 session):

[Open Shark IQ sign-in]({pkce_url})

Or copy/paste it manually:

```
{pkce_url}
```

**2.** Sign in with your SharkClean email + password and complete any captcha. **Important:** if you recently reset your password, you must first sign in successfully in the real SharkClean **mobile app** once to clear Auth0's *force-password-change* flag — otherwise this browser flow will bounce you to a *please return to the SharkClean app to change your password* screen.

**3.** After you finish signing in, the browser will try to navigate to a URL starting with `com.sharkninja.shark://...`. It will fail to load, and the address bar often goes blank. Don't worry — the URL we need is still there:

   - **Easy way:** if the address bar shows `com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=...&state=...`, just copy it from the address bar.
   - **DevTools way (if the address bar is empty):**
     1. Before clicking **Sign in**, press <kbd>F12</kbd> to open DevTools and switch to the **Network** tab.
     2. Tick **Preserve log** so it doesn't clear on navigation.
     3. Complete the sign-in.
     4. In the Network tab, find the last request whose path is `/authorize/resume?...` (status **302**), or the very last request before the error page.
     5. Click it → **Headers** → under **Response Headers**, copy the value of the `Location:` header. It starts with `com.sharkninja.shark://` and contains `?code=...&state=...`.

**4.** Paste that URL into the box below (you can also paste just the `code` parameter value if you'd rather not paste the whole URL).

Once verified we'll cache the Auth0 refresh token, so future Home Assistant restarts skip this whole dance.

reauth_confirm.description: Sign in again to refresh credentials. If Auth0 demands verification you'll be guided through the browser login.

invalid_room.message: The room {room} is unavailable to your vacuum. Make sure all rooms match the SharkClean app, including capitalisation.

clean_room.description: Cleans a specific user-defined room or set of rooms.
clean_room.name: Clean room
